One Plus One is One

A Language Thought experiment on the Cosmological Singularity and the Big Bang

35 God's DNA V: the Final Signature יהשוה

Tags: FORGET TO REMEMBER QUANTUM DNA QUANTUM GRAMMAR
Normand Bourque Fri, Jul 12, 2013 7 min read

Mosaic, St-John’s Cathedral, Hong Kong

 

“God said: Divinity is housed within the Human. The meeting place of the human and the Divine is in your heart. I live in your heart. The human is a high expression of the Divine on Earth. Earth is not a low place, for you remember space does not exist. Heaven is pictured as very High Up, yet the Divine is as much you as the Human. What might be called a High Human is Divine, and, yet, every human is Divine. They work together.”  http://www.heavenletters.org/not-two-but-one.html

“God said: As it is, you depend on your form and call it by a sound, a name, that may not be your name or your sound. I suppose, if I were naming you, I would name you Beloved, or, perhaps, for short, Love. http://www.heavenletters.org/the-name-that-god-would-give-to-you.html

“God said: Looking into My eyes and saying My Name is worth more than anything you can put in your hand. With your intent on My eyes and My Name vibrating in you, you have everything. A seed contains the whole.”  http://www.heavenletters.org/the-name-god.html

“Note that each layer of DNA is an ancient name of God. Why would this be? Because the absolute truth, dear one, is that you are a piece of the creator — not creation, but the source energy of God. This means that I know you and you know me. It means that you always have been and always will be. This is the hardest thing for a Human to understand, and the reality of it is truly hidden in the 3D hologram you are all in. If it were actually known or seen, then it would take the test out of the earth’s purpose to eventually create the beginning vibration of a new Universe. Therefore, it’s about the celebration of who you are as my spiritual family.” KRYON, through Lee Carroll, from Kryon Book Twelve: “The Twelve Layers of DNA.

_________________________

We have stated in the previous blog that if the human species is different from all other mammals on earth, it is because of the set of instructions that command the processes of information in the quantum DNA. If the human body was created with the physical and chemical elements of the earth, the seed DNA or quantum DNA of the human species (God’s signature in the human cell) comes from somewhere else in our galaxy (some say the Pleiadians) or from another dimension(Kryon). The human being is the only species on earth that can change its structure through  his own will.

We have also stated that the quantum DNA of animals and plants also have a set of instructions that allow them to recognize the human DNA and devote themselves to serving the human (Kryon). It is like if the cosmic plan was to create a conjunction between a seed containing God’s signature or image and a human terrestrial body, a conjunction between heaven and earth.

This conjunction is particularly obvious in the fact that the animal and vegetal realms must diversify, hence differentiate, to survive. For example, how many species of monkeys exist on earth? But it seems to be the opposite with the human species. We don’t find on earth any different species of humans with different DNA. There exist only one kind of human with only one kind of DNA. What was taken for different species of humans during the colonial times was a confusion of attributes (morphological and cultural traits) with what defines genetically a race or species.

Then it can be stated that the survival of the human species is not insured through diversification or differentiation but through unification.

Animals don’t lose themselves because their quantum DNA is “informed” or programmed in what we call instincts. Their only free will is their instincts.  But can we really say that the human species, even considered as an animal species, has instincts?

We would dare to answer NO: the human species does not ensure its survival through its instincts since it has a propensity to lose itself. His survival is left in the hands of his free will to choose. If survival was instinctive in man, he would not put his environment and his own species into jeopardy.

The quantum origin of darkness and gravity

The human being cannot lose himself really or fundamentally because he carries the encrypted map of its origin and identity. But, through free will, yes, he can lose himself virtually in a dream. The Universe answered man’s will to differentiate from God by creating him a home surrounded by darkness and subjected to the force of earth gravity: his body.  Since light is the principle of unification, man could only virtually differentiate itself by creating darkness, negation, absence, gravity around himself in order to create himself and create other separate entities. —Gravity keeps humans away from the sun—. Apparently losing himself, man had to invent a map of survival and the first step was to create himself a self-identity, a personal name, through the belief that he created himself and therefore had to dominate everything around him. This created the 3-D level of his DNA, the protein-encoding of his body, the code that allows him to experiment differentiation, separation.

But the human could not do that without usurping, in his belief, God’s power as a Creator, also without wanting to kill God. This is the base of darkness, which is hard and cold as steel,  as the only way for man to survive through differentiation. So what we would assume as human instincts of survival are only made of fear, anger, guilt, and retaliation. The will to kill God was easily projected into killing his neighbor. This is not at all the kind of instincts we generally observe in the animal world! Furthermore, (domestic) animals must really have the ability in their quantum DNA to detect or see, like God,  the fundamental good nature of man in staying devoted to him even when they are mistreated by him.

God says to look into His eyes and to say His name (cf. opening quotes). But it seems extremely difficult for the human being to do so because then he would have to admit that what he pretends to be his instincts of survival is just a fake. It is hidden fear of retaliation, shame and guilt. He does not dare to stand tall, as he was created, because he would have to recognize his mistake. But this attitude of littleness is just a cover-up of his pride and his resistance to acknowledge that he has lost his way.

In brief, the human being refuses the atonement because he doesn’t want to admit that he is just dreaming. He does not want to awake. He thinks that if he awakes, he will give up something.

But this is only a game since the human being carries his real name in his DNA. This game of hide and seek is an investment for the Universe because it is a unique experience of affirming Light through its negation. The human knows God but he decided to play the game that he does not know Him. This impossible scenario is “possible” only through the process of forgetting in order to remember better. Since the human thinks he forgot that completely, it became very difficult for him to understand that he already knows everything because he carries the Name that Is everything. The reality of this is really “hidden in the 3D hologram he is in”. So this process of not knowing and not being able to see through forgetting became the experience or the test of love and truth through dual thinking: light emerging by itself and progressively from darkness through the will or intent to remember. It is like creating more powerful light through resisting it. It becomes the potential of “creating the beginning vibration of a new Universe”.

Let’s see how this experience of resisting to the Light generates more Light and how the signature of God is really expressed through this resistance.

The final signature

“The human is a high expression of the Divine on earth”.

In the Kabbala, God’s signature in the human quantum DNA (YHWH) is an attractor (syntropy). It is a map, a potential, yet it is not actual. It requires the human INTENT to recognize himself as the living image or manifestation of GOD through the generative grammar or program YHWH. This manifestation of God’s image is called the Sonship. And God has only One Son. The Great Ones are the perfect expression of this singularity or oneness of the sonship. The Kabbala expresses this Sonship by the transformation of the Tetragrammaton into the Pentagrammaton. See the illustration below.

Here is the generative quantum grammar that illustrates the process of this manifestation. The generative principle (God as Aleph expressed in the double helix א) projects His image into the Son represented by the letter Sh (Shin ש). The response or echo to the call/double helix Aleph is the Son Shin. The Shin represents the fire (ASh אש in Hebrew). In its prototypical form, the Pentagrammaton YH Sh WH represents God projecting Himself and manifesting himself through the Son who is Light and Fire. YH Sh WH corresponds to YHeShuWHa (translated Jesus).

YheShuWHa is the Christ written in its original generative grammatical form. And it has a double meaning. YH Sh WH is a prototype of God’s Son and, in the historical person of Jesus, it represents the conjunction of heaven and earth in an incarnated individual. The Sh represents a triple flame and, at the same time, a sailboat with its 3 masts and its 3 sails, floating above the waters of materiality.

Through the human experience of darkness in duality, of forgetting to remember better, the resistance of the human to God becomes the generator of the light/fire of its divine incarnation. This is the meaning of the Atonement, the marriage of earth and heaven, the paradise on earth.

“God said: As it is, you depend on your form and call it by a sound, a name, that may not be your name or your sound. I suppose, if I were naming you, I would name you Beloved, or, perhaps, for short, Love.” This name is YH Sh WH. It is a reflection in God’s eye of His own vibrating Name.

 

Written by Normand Bourque on Jul 12, 2013

59 The Ultimate Technology is the Universe Itself

Normand Bourque Sun, Feb 2, 2014 6 min read

A 360° VISION:

Because of our unconditional belief in scientific cosmology, notably in quantum physics, it seems that we are no longer sovereign of our spirit. Yet we need to expand our vision. We want a 360° vision, and that is an inner vision that prevents our outer vision from an excess of details that distract from reality. A thought experiment is a sinking into a reality where details are not present. It is a sinking process rather than an analyzing one.

A sample of chapter titles follow:

  • In the Beginning, there was the Present
  • Food for thoughts, thoughts for food
  • Have you ever tried counting to 1?
  • A particle has no parts
  • What is a singularity?
  • Is it really a Big Bang or an implosion?
  • The center of the initial singularity
